title: Nasturtium nudiusculum
taxonomy: Nasturtium nudiusculum is a species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. This annual plant is native to South America and belongs to the genus Tropaeolum. It is often classified within the order Brassicales. As part of the Brassicaceae family, Nasturtium nudiusculum shares characteristics with other plants in the mustard family. The plant's classification is further defined by its unique combination of physical and genetic traits.
